pages.text: The Magic Center GUI provides several controls to fine-tune your ritual setup.$(br2)$(bold)Circle Type Toggles$() - Each circle type (Attack, Defense, Regeneration) has an On/Off switch. Turn off types you don't want to use without breaking the circles.

$(bold)Player Blacklist$() - Add players by name to prevent them from receiving any circle effects. To add a player, type their name in the text field and click $(bold)Add$(). To remove, click $(bold)Remove$() next to their name.$(br2)$(bold)Mob Filters$() - Toggle whether hostile mobs (zombies, skeletons, etc.) and passive mobs (cows, sheep, etc.) receive circle effects.
All settings are saved and will persist even if the center block is unloaded and reloaded. Changes take effect immediately - there is no need to refresh or reload the setup.
